quote: Never lose hope. Storms make people stronger and never last forever. – Roy T. Bennett
fact: A “quidnunc” is a person who is eager to know the latest news and gossip.
joke: A woman is on trial for beating her husband to death with his guitar collection. Judge says, ‘First offender?’ She says, ‘No, first a Gibson! Then a Fender!’
